name: Beast
effect: Cannot open doors, climb ladders, or use equipment.

name: Coordinated Strike
effect: Activate another friendly Stormtrooper after this fighter finishes their activation.

name: For the Empire!
effect: Friendly Stormtrooper fighters within 6” may make a free Move or Attack action.

name: Riot Shield
effect: Reaction: After this fighter has been hit but before damage is calculated, change one crit into a hit or one hit into a miss.

name: Shield Charge
effect: This fighter can make a bonus move action towards an enemy fighter within 5”.

name: Coordinated Advance
effect: This model and one friendly fighter within 3" may each make a free 2" move.

name: Suppress and Secure
effect: Choose up to 3 friendly fighters within 6”. Each chooses a visible enemy; that enemy receives a Suppression token (-1 Atk, -1" Mv).

name: Cover Identity
effect: This fighter gains a Stealth token.

name: Demolition Charge
effect: Place a token within 4”. At the end of activation, all fighters within 3” of token take 3 damage. Use once per game.

name: Inspire Rebellion
effect: This fighter and one other within 3” gain +1” Move and may make a free Move or Stealth action.

name: Coordinated Uprising
effect: All friendly Sleeper Cell fighters may immediately make a free Move or Disengage.

name: Diagnostic Protocol
effect: Choose a friendly non-Droid within 3". Heal that fighter for D6 wounds.

name: Interface Access
effect: Complete an interaction with an objective within 1" for free. Counts as Computers (2).

name: Translator
effect: An enemy within 6" gains a Suppressed token (-1 Atk, -1" Mv).

name: Make Ten Men Feel Like a Hundred
effect: All friendly fighters within 6" can make a move action of up to 4”.

name: Defensive Protocol
effect: Reaction: After dice rolled against an ally within 2", K-2SO becomes the target of the attack instead.

name: Loyal to the End
effect: Until end of round, if this fighter is within 4" of an ally, both gain +1 Defence.

name: Tactical Assault
effect: Iden and up to 2 friendly fighters within 4” may each perform a free Move or Ranged Attack action.

name: Balance through Action
effect: This fighter may immediately make two Move actions and one Attack action in any order.

name: Deflect
effect: Reaction: Change crit to hit or hit to miss. If blaster within 6”, deal 2 damage to attacker.

name: This Is the Way
effect: If an enemy was taken down this activation, make a bonus move and a bonus attack action.

name: Whistling Birds
effect: Up to 3 visible enemies within 6" take 3 damage automatically. Once per battle.

name: I Know What I'm Doing
effect: Cassian may immediately perform an interaction or objective action. This does not count against his action limit.

name: Sarcastic Quip
effect: Choose an enemy within 6". That enemy receives a Suppression token and cannot use Reactions until its next activation.

name: Force Push
effect: Choose an enemy within 4". Move that model up to 3" in any direction. This can force a model to Disengage.

name: Blade Dance
effect: Ahsoka may make a melee attack against every enemy model she is currently engaged with.

name: Whipcord
effect: Target an enemy within 4". That enemy is Stunned and its Move is reduced to 1" until the end of the round.

name: Fire Support
effect: If a friendly unit within 6" attacks, this fighter may spend their activation to add their own attack dice to that pool.

name: Guardian
effect: Reaction: If a friendly leader within 2" is targeted by a ranged attack, this model becomes the target instead.

name: Wheel Mode
effect: The Droideka gains +4" Move and +1 Defence, but cannot perform attack actions until the end of the round.

name: Disciplined
effect: At the start of its activation, this fighter may automatically remove one Suppression or Stun token.

name: Steady
effect: This fighter does not count as having moved for the purposes of weapon traits (such as Heavy or Reload).

name: Targeted Fire
effect: The next Ranged Attack made by this fighter this activation ignores the effects of Light Cover.

name: Reliable
effect: When making a Defence roll, this fighter may reroll one blank result.

name: Nimble
effect: If this fighter is targeted by a Ranged Attack and takes no damage, they may immediately make a free 2" move.

name: Ready
effect: If this fighter ends its activation without attacking, it may perform one free Reaction before its next activation.

name: Danger Sense
effect: While this fighter has at least one Suppression token, they gain a Stealth token at the end of their activation.

name: Indomitable
effect: This fighter is immune to the effects of Suppression tokens and cannot be forced to flee the board.

name: Coordinate
effect: When this fighter is activated, you may immediately activate one friendly Droid of the same name within 3".

name: Outmaneuver
effect: This fighter can move through enemy models as if they were friendly models (but cannot end a move on them).

name: Self-Preservation
effect: This fighter may perform a Disengage action. This usually costs [double] but for this fighter it costs [single].

name: Spotter
effect: Choose an enemy within 12". Friendly fighters within 6" ignore the effects of Light Cover when attacking that enemy this round.

name: Tactical
effect: After this fighter performs a Move action, they gain a Stealth token.

name: Cover Identity
effect: This fighter gains a Stealth token.

name: Inspire Rebellion
effect: This fighter and one other friendly within 3” gain +1” Move and may make a free Move or Stealth action.

name: Sprint
effect: Increase the movement value of this fighter by 1 until the end of their activation.

name: Coordinated Uprising
effect: All friendly Sleeper Cell fighters may immediately make a free Move or Disengage action.

name: Gunslinger's Gambit
effect: For this fighter's next attack this activation, they may target two enemy fighters. Resolve attacks against both fighters independently using the normal attack profile but with 1 less attack dice.

name: Coordinated Strike
effect: Immediately activate another friendly Stormtrooper within 6" after this fighter finishes their activation.

name: Shield Charge
effect: Make a move action (up to 5") directly toward an enemy. If you end within 1", that enemy suffers 1 damage.

name: Distraction
effect: Target visible enemy within 6". They must move 3" directly toward this fighter.

name: Deflect
effect: Reaction: Change one Crit to Hit or Hit to Miss. If triggered by a Blaster within 6", deal 2 damage to attacker.

name: Force Push
effect: Move target within 3" directly away 3" or until they hit terrain/fighter.

name: Whistling Birds
effect: Up to 3 visible enemies within 6" take 3 damage. Limited(1).

name: Loyal to the End
effect: Until the end of this round, if this fighter is within 4" of an ally, both gain +1 Defence.

name: Rapid Redeployment
effect: After making an attack, this fighter may immediately make a free move action.

name: Tactical Assault
effect: Iden and up to 2 friendly fighters within 4” may each perform a free Move or Ranged Attack action.

name: Data Spike
effect: Interact with electronic devices within 6". Instantly open doors, disable traps, or override security systems.

name: Recon Protocol
effect: Remove the stealth tokens from any enemy fighters within 6".

name: Target Designation
effect: Mark an enemy within 6". Friendly fighters gain +1 to attack rolls against that target.

name: Diagnostic Protocol
effect: Choose a friendly non-droid within 3". Heal that fighter for D6 wounds.

name: Interface Access
effect: Choose an objective within 1". Complete one interaction immediately. If a check is required, this fighter has Computers (2).

name: Non-Combatant
effect: .This Fighter cannot take the attack action. They cannot be targeted if a closer visible ally exists, unless the attacker is within 6".

name: Translator
effect: Distract an enemy within 6". They gain a Suppressed token (-1 Attack, -1" Move) until the end of their next activation.

name: Force Sensitive
effect: This fighter is considered a force user. This has no mechanical effect but may be referenced by other abilities.

name: Force Leap
effect: This fighter gains the Fly trait until the end of this activation.

name: Dual Strike
effect: For this fighter's next attack this activation, they may target two enemy fighters. Resolve attacks against both fighters independently using the normal attack profile but with 1 less attack dice.

name: Spies & Saboteurs
effect: Select a point on a terrain feature within 12” of this fighter. Do damage points to all fighters within 3” of this point equal to the value of this ability.

name: Droid
effect: This fighter is a Droid. Abilities and Gear cannot heal them unless it specifies Droid. They cannot gain experience or advancements and cannot gain injuries.

name: Bounty Hunter
effect: If this fighter has already incapacitated an enemy fighter this turn, they may take a free move or attack action.

name: Infiltrate
effect: When deployed, this fighter may be set up 6" inches of their deployment point.

name: Special Forces Training
effect: For the remainder of this activation, this fighter may perform a free [Interact] or [Stealth] action after performing an [Attack] action.

name: Silent Take-Down
effect: If this fighter is within 1" of an enemy and has a Stealth token, they may make a melee attack. If the target is incapacitated, this fighter does not lose their Stealth token.

name: Quick Shot
effect: Make a bonus ranged attack action with -1 attack die. Target must be within half max range.

name: Pistolier
effect: Next attack with paired weapons may target two enemies within 6". -1 Attack per target; roll separately.

name: Eagle Eye
effect: Add 5" to the maximum range of this fighter's next ranged attack action this turn.

name: Trick Shooter
effect: Next ranged attack ignores Line of Sight requirements; measure range along the path the shot takes.

name: Aimed Shot
effect: If unmoved this round, deal +1 damage on next ranged attack. Cannot move for the rest of the turn.

name: Marksman
effect: Add +1 to the Weapon Skill (BS) for the next ranged attack action made by this fighter.

name: Teleport
effect: Remove from battlefield; place anywhere on the floor more than 5" from enemies.

name: Curse
effect: Target visible enemy within 6" takes D3 damage and -1 Defence until end of round.

name: Heal
effect: Choose a friendly within 3". Remove damage points equal to the value of this ability (D6).

name: Arcane Shield
effect: Until the end of the round, this fighter counts as having a Shield (+1 Defence).

name: Foresight
effect: Change a saved Ability die value to be +1 (max 6).

name: Mana Surge
effect: Immediately gain 2 Ability dice. These must be used before the end of this fighter's activation.

name: Strike to Injure
effect: For the next melee attack, critical hits deal double damage and reduce target Defence by 1.

name: Combat Master
effect: Make a melee attack against every visible enemy within 1". Resolve each separately.

name: Weapons Training
effect: This fighter may use two different melee weapon profiles in one activation.

name: Wall of Steel
effect: Reaction: When hit in melee, roll a d6. On a 5+, the attacker suffers 2 damage.

name: Victory Rush
effect: Use only if you took down an enemy. Heal yourself for 3 wounds.

name: Knife-Fighter
effect: Reaction: Make a bonus melee attack with a Knife/Dagger if an enemy ends a move within 3".

name: Mighty Blow
effect: This fighter's next melee attack deals triple damage on a critical hit.

name: Pit Fighter
effect: If within 1" of 2+ enemies, add +1 to Attacks characteristic for this activation.

name: Resilient
effect: Use when hit but before damage. Ignore up to 2 damage from that specific hit/crit.

name: Fearsome
effect: Enemy fighters within 3" suffer -1 Weapon Skill until end of round.

name: Unstoppable Charge
effect: After a move ending within 1" of an enemy, deal 2 damage and make a free melee attack.

name: Savage Blow
effect: Next melee attack deals +2 damage if it scores a critical hit.

name: Leap
effect: Move over gaps up to 3" wide without needing to roll for a jump.

name: Sprint
effect: Perform two consecutive move actions as a single activation (leaving 1 action free).

name: Acrobat
effect: Ignore vertical distance when climbing or leaping this turn.

name: Lightning Reflexes
effect: Reaction: When targeted by melee, roll d6. On a 5+, avoid all damage from the attack.

name: Step Aside
effect: Reaction: If enemy ends move within 1", make a free disengage action.

name: Nimble
effect: When hit by ranged, subtract 1 from the attacker's Hits (not Crits).

name: Voice of Command
effect: Allies within 6" may make a free move of up to 2".

name: Inspirational
effect: Allies within 6" may reroll one die during attack actions this turn.

name: Iron Will
effect: Allies with Shields within 3" gain +2 Defence until end of round.

name: Mentor
effect: Activate a visible friendly within 6" immediately after this activation ends.

name: Overseer
effect: Pick an ally within 6". They can make a bonus move or attack action.

name: Regroup
effect: Allies within 6" may disengage and heal up to 2 damage.

name: Fade into Shadows
effect: This fighter gains a Stealth token.

name: Shadow Step
effect: Teleport to a point within 6" not visible to any enemy.

name: Smoke Bomb
effect: Allies within 6" gain Stealth tokens if not currently visible to enemies.

name: Assassin's Mark
effect: Mark an enemy within 6". If they are within 1" of a Stealthed ally, their Defence is -1.

name: Silent Ambush
effect: Make a bonus move if Stealthed and not visible to any enemy.

name: Vanish
effect: Remove from play. Deploy anywhere >6" from enemies next round with a Stealth token.
